allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:5000/download/resume -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"theme": "modern_blue", "optimized_resume_text": "John Doe\\nSoftware Engineer\\n\\nExperience:\\n- Developed Python apps\\n\\nSkills:\\nPython, JavaScript"}' -w "\\nHTTP Status: %{http_code}\\n")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:5000/download/resume -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"theme": "modern_blue", "optimized_resume_text": "John Doe\\nSoftware Engineer\\n\\nExperience:\\n- Developed Python apps\\n\\nSkills:\\nPython, JavaScript"}' --output test-resume.pdf -w "%{http_code}")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:5000/download/resume -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"theme": "modern_blue", "optimized_resume_text": "John Doe\\njohn@email.com | \(555\) 123-4567 | New York\\n\\nSummary\\nExperienced software engineer with 5+ years building scalable web applications.\\n\\nExperience\\nSenior Software Engineer at Tech Corp 2020 - Present\\n- Developed REST APIs serving 1M+ daily requests\\n- Led team of 4 engineers\\n- Reduced deployment time by 40%\\n\\nSkills\\nPython, JavaScript, Flask, React, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS"}' --output test-resume.pdf -w "\\nHTTP: %{http_code}\\n")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:5000/download/resume -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"format": "modern", "optimized_resume_text": "John Doe\\njohn@email.com\\n\\nSummary\\nExperienced developer.\\n\\nExperience\\nSenior Engineer at Company\\n- Built APIs\\n- Led team"}' --output test-resume.pdf -w "\\nHTTP: %{http_code}\\n")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:5000/download/resume -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"format": "classic", "optimized_resume_text": "John Doe\\njohn@email.com\\n\\nSummary\\nExperienced developer.\\n\\nExperience\\nSenior Engineer at Company\\n- Built APIs\\n- Led team"}' --output test-classic.pdf -w "\\nHTTP: %{http_code}\\n")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:5000/analyze -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"resume": "John Doe\\nSenior Developer\\njohn@email.com\\n\\nSkills: Python, JavaScript, React\\n\\nExperience:\\n- Senior Engineer at TechCorp \(2020-Present\)\\n- Built REST APIs with Python\\n\\nEducation:\\n- BS Computer Science, MIT, 2018\\n\\nProjects:\\n- E-commerce Platform with React\\n\\nCertifications:\\n- AWS Solutions Architect", "jd": "Requirements: Python, REST APIs, AWS, JavaScript, React, Kubernetes, CI/CD. 3+ years experience. Senior level preferred. Bachelor degree in Computer Science."}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:5000/download/resume -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"optimized_resume_text": "John Doe\\nSenior Developer\\njohn@email.com\\n\\nSkills: Python, JavaScript, React\\n\\nExperience:\\n- Senior Engineer at TechCorp\\n- Built APIs\\n\\nEducation: BS CS\\n\\nProjects: E-commerce\\n\\nCertifications: AWS"}' --output test.pdf -w "\\nHTTP: %{http_code}\\n")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:5000/download/resume -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"optimized_resume_text": "John Doe\\nSenior Developer\\njohn@email.com\\n\\nSummary:\\nExperienced developer\\n\\nSkills:\\nPython, JavaScript, React\\n\\nExperience:\\nSenior Engineer at TechCorp\\n\\nEducation:\\nBS Computer Science\\n\\nProjects:\\nE-commerce Platform\\n\\nCertifications:\\nAWS Certified"}' --output test.pdf -w "\\nHTTP: %{http_code}\\n")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:5000/download/report -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"confidence_score": 75, "comparison": {"overall": {"requirements_match_pct": 80, "skills_match_pct": 60, "keyword_density": 70}, "skills_have": ["Python", "JavaScript"], "skills_need": ["AWS"], "experience_analysis": {"jd_level": "senior", "resume_level": "senior", "jd_years": 3, "resume_years": 5, "verdict": "You have more than required", "matched_verbs": ["developed", "led"], "missing_verbs": ["optimized"]}, "matched_requirements": ["Python experience"], "missing_requirements": ["AWS"], "education_match": "Met", "certification_match": "AWS certified"}, "matched_keywords_list": ["python", "aws"]}' --output test.pdf -w "\\nHTTP: %{http_code}\\n")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:5000/analyze -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"resume": "John Doe\\nPython developer", "jd": "Python required"}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:5000/analyze -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"resume": "John Doe\\nSenior Developer\\njohn@email.com\\n\\nSummary\\nExperienced developer with 5+ years in Python and JavaScript.\\n\\nSkills\\nPython, JavaScript, React, AWS, Docker\\n\\nExperience\\nSenior Engineer at TechCorp \(2020-Present\)\\n- Built REST APIs with Python\\n- Led team of 4 developers\\n\\nEducation\\nBS Computer Science, MIT, 2018\\n\\nProjects\\nE-commerce Platform with React\\n\\nCertifications\\nAWS Solutions Architect", "jd": "Requirements:\\n- 3+ years Python experience\\n- REST API experience\\n- AWS and Kubernetes\\n- CI/CD pipelines\\n- Senior level\\n- Computer Science degree"}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:5000/analyze -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"resume": "John Doe\\nSenior Developer\\njohn@email.com\\n\\nSummary\\nExperienced developer with 5+ years in Python and JavaScript.\\n\\nSkills\\nPython, JavaScript, React, AWS, Docker\\n\\nExperience\\nSenior Engineer at TechCorp \(2020-Present\)\\n- Built REST APIs\\n- Led team\\n\\nEducation\\nBS Computer Science\\n\\nProjects\\nE-commerce Platform\\n\\nCertifications\\nAWS Certified", "jd": "Requirements: Python, AWS, Kubernetes, 3+ years experience"}')
